source_jobs.title: Looking for another scientific role?
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Kingdom creates and sells natural functional ingredients that actually work. Our Superculture® ingredients are an entirely new class of clinically-validated postbiotics that target the root causes of unmet health needs. Superculture® Pet Oral and Superculture® Pet Immune are our first two breakthrough ingredients for pet health, driving industry-leading efficacy and unlocking new marketing claims for brands. By the end of 2025, we will have run 10 clinical studies on our Superculture® ingredients, giving them unparalleled validation compared to other ingredients on the market.

Kingdom is the trusted ingredient partner of top brands, with two pet Superculture® ingredients in market today and a first human Superculture® ingredient in development. A number of leading pet brands are already incorporating Superculture® Pet Oral and Superculture® Pet Immune into their end products, and many more have planned launches coming soon.

We're building a team of brilliant, innovative, and kind individuals, and are always on the lookout for exceptional people aligned with our ethos.




DON'T SEE THE ROLE FOR YOU? SEND US YOUR RESUME!

We post the roles we're actively hiring for on our careers page https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/kingdomsupercultures. If you are excited about Kingdom and don't see a good role for you posted, please apply here. We're growing quickly and will get back to you when we have a position that matches your background.




OUR VALUES

 - Solve from first principles

 - Collaborate with kindness

 - Be resourceful and resilient




COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary and generous equity upside

 - Fully-paid medical, vision, and dental insurance

 - Flexible PTO

 - Snacks, fruits, and drinks

 - 401K participation

 - Parental leave

 - Commuter benefits: subsidized metrocards, free Citibike, free parking

source_jobs.title: GTM Systems Lead
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Kingdom is building the world's first AI-native functional ingredients company, with $40M+ in venture funding from top investors. We've pioneered Superculture® ingredients: an entirely new class of clinically validated postbiotics, made from natural microbes, that target the root causes of unmet health needs for people and pets. We’re launching one new clinically backed ingredient every year.

Our edge starts with one of the world's largest, most diverse biobanks of proprietary microbial strains, sourced from natural foods and environmental sources. On top of it, we've built a scientific platform spanning ingredient discovery, clinical trials, and manufacturing scale-up that lets our small team outcompete companies 100X+ our size. Now, we're rebuilding how a functional ingredients company operates from the ground up, and that transformation starts with our GTM function.

We're actively selling Superculture® Pet Oral and Superculture® Pet Immune to pet food and supplement brands. Less than a year in market, our ingredients are already powering dozens of products from leading pet brands, with overwhelmingly positive customer reception. One in three product launches using our ingredients has earned a #1 New Release on Amazon, and nine in ten of our customers are launching additional products with us.

Now we're scaling rapidly. We'll launch our first Superculture ingredient for humans later this year, opening up an entirely new market. And we're expanding internationally, starting with the EU/UK and China, with Australia/New Zealand and other APAC markets on the horizon.

ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a high-performing GTM Systems Lead to build the foundational systems that power Kingdom’s sales motions. This is an AI-native builder role. You'll design, build, and own the automated, human-in-the-loop systems and AI agents that multiply our team's capacity across the entire motion: signal-driven prospecting, lead qualification, outbound, the measurement layer, and the data infrastructure underneath.

We want someone who gets deep on how our team actually works, sees the inefficiencies across the GTM motion, and gets excited to build the systems and agents that fix them. You'll work directly with our VP of GTM and GTM Senior Manager, and closely with our AI-obsessed co-founders building Kingdom's internal tooling. The goal is to supercharge our sellers, freeing them to spend their time selling and arming them with the data and insights to close far more than they could alone

This is a commercial role, with success measured by the revenue our GTM team closes because of the systems you build.

This is a full-time, in-person role at our headquarters in the Brooklyn Navy Yard, four days a week (Monday–Thursday, with Fridays optional WFH).


 

RESPONSIBILITIES

In this role, you’ll report to the VP of GTM/Growth, and will work with our commercial team, co-founders, and key scientists to:

Expand top-of-funnel:

 - Build agentic outbound systems: target list building, enrichment, hyperpersonalized email and LinkedIn campaigns, and signal-based re-engagement (job changes, LinkedIn posts, press)

 - Build agentic inbound lead qualification, routing, and customer segmentation that powers sharper value propositions by brand

 - Automate market intelligence tracking (category growth, consumer trends) to inform targeted outbound and marketing content

Move deals through to revenue:

 - Automate the meeting cycle: pre-meeting research and prep, post-meeting follow-up emails, CRM updates, and next-step assignments

 - Build automated rule-based deal flagging (stalled, at-risk, expansion opportunities)

 - Build agentic systems for deal-specific research, custom presentations, and keeping validation databases and snippets current

Build and own the data and measurement foundation:

 - Map sources of all GTM data, define go-forward data structure, and build roadmap for ensuring Kingdom’s internal AI has access to a single source of

source_jobs.title: Scientist, Clinical Development
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Kingdom is building the world's first AI-native functional ingredients company, with $40M+ in venture funding from top investors. We've pioneered Superculture® ingredients: an entirely new class of clinically validated postbiotics, made from natural microbes, that target the root causes of unmet health needs for people and pets. We’re launching one new clinically backed ingredient every year.

We're looking for a high-performing Scientist, Clinical Development, to join our small but mighty team. This is an AI-native science role: you'll own Kingdom's pet clinical study program end-to-end, deploying custom and integrated LLM-tooling to automate and accelerate your work. We want a PhD-level scientist who can both apply rigorous judgment to study design, biomarker selection, statistical analysis, and scientific reporting, and who is excited to build AI infrastructure that lets us run more clinical trials. This is a science role, with success measured by the clinical studies we complete and the peer-reviewed publications we deliver.

Our edge starts with one of the world's largest, most diverse biobanks of proprietary microbial strains, sourced from natural foods and environmental sources. On top of it, we've built a scientific platform spanning ingredient discovery, clinical trials, and manufacturing scale-up that lets our small team outcompete companies 100X+ our size.

We're actively selling Superculture® Pet Oral and Superculture® Pet Immune to pet food and supplement brands. Less than a year in market, our ingredients are already powering dozens of products from leading pet brands, with overwhelmingly positive customer reception. One in three product launches using our ingredients has earned a #1 New Release on Amazon, and nine in ten of our customers are launching additional products with us.

Now we're scaling rapidly. We'll launch our first Superculture ingredient for humans later this year, opening up an entirely new market. And we're expanding internationally, starting with the EU/UK and China, with Australia/New Zealand and other APAC markets on the horizon.

This is a full-time, in-person role at our headquarters in Brooklyn, NY, with occasional travel to scientific and industry conferences.

 
 

RESPONSIBILITIES

In this role, you'll report to the Senior Scientific Director, and will work with our science team, co-founders, CRO partners, and the commercial team to:

Run Kingdom's pet clinical study program end-to-end:

 - Design and execute canine and feline studies: literature review, population and biomarker selection, SOP writing, statistical analysis planning, data processing and vetting, and internal and external reporting

 - Own operational strategy for pet studies, including evaluation of internal capabilities vs. external partners

 - Evaluate new CRO partners from a technical perspective, serve as the primary technical contact with pet CROs, and make CRO recommendations to the team for relevant studies

 - Expand pet clinical strategy across additional CROs and a broader range of study types

Translate science into evidence and customer-facing materials:

 - Lead peer-reviewed scientific publications for our pet ingredient programs (Superculture® Pet Oral, Superculture® Pet Immune, and future pet ingredients)

 - Generate commercial-grade materials for the GTM team from the primary technical reporting, sharp enough to hold up in front of customers

Build and deploy LLM-tooling:

 - Build and maintain pet-specific LLM-tools across literature review, study design, statistical analysis, and scientific reporting

 - Connect tools into a single, end-to-end pet clinical pipeline, with intermediate handoffs eliminated and technical oversight and quality preserved

 - Contribute to Kingdom's broader AI infrastructure for clinical science, alongside other scientists on the team


COMPETENCIES & QUALIFICATIONS

 - PhD (or equivalent depth) in a life-sciences field, 0-3 years post-graduate.

 - Strong statis

source_jobs.title: Senior Scientist, Computational Biology & Data Infrastructure
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Kingdom is building the world's first AI-native functional ingredients company, with $40M+ in venture funding from top investors. We've pioneered Superculture® ingredients: an entirely new class of clinically validated postbiotics, made from natural microbes, that target the root causes of unmet health needs for people and pets. We’re launching one new clinically backed ingredient every year.

We're looking for a high-performing Senior Scientist, Computational Biology & Data Infrastructure, to join our small but mighty team. This is an AI-native science role: you'll own the computational backbone of Kingdom's research (the microbial genomics and AI-compatible data infrastructure that every wet-lab program depends on) and ship custom and integrated LLM tooling to automate and accelerate our work. We want a PhD-level computational biologist (or related area) who applies rigorous scientific judgment to genomic analysis, biobank strategy, and statistical methods, and is equally excited to build the systems that let everyone move faster. Fundamentally, this is a science role, with success measured by the integrity of our data, the insights our data infrastructure unlocks, and the AI tooling we deploy across our scientific platform.

Our edge starts with one of the world's largest, most diverse biobanks of proprietary microbial strains, sourced from natural foods and environmental sources. On top of it, we've built a scientific platform spanning ingredient discovery, clinical trials, and manufacturing scale-up that lets our small team outcompete companies 100X+ our size.

We're actively selling Superculture® Pet Oral and Superculture® Pet Immune to pet food and supplement brands. Less than a year in market, our ingredients are already powering dozens of products from leading pet brands, with overwhelmingly positive customer reception. One in three product launches using our ingredients has earned a #1 New Release on Amazon, and nine in ten of our customers are launching additional products with us.

Now we're scaling rapidly. We'll launch our first Superculture ingredient for humans later this year, opening up an entirely new market. And we're expanding internationally, starting with the EU/UK and China, with Australia/New Zealand and other APAC markets on the horizon.

This is a full-time, in-person role at our headquarters in Brooklyn, NY.

 
 

RESPONSIBILITIES

In this role, you’ll report to the Senior Scientific Director, and will work closely with our science team & co-founders to:

Own genomic analyses and biobank strategy:

 - Run computational genomic safety analyses and author the supporting reports that underpin our regulatory and customer-facing safety documentation

 - Maintain the whole-genome sequencing pipeline: assembly of incoming sequencing data, linkage of genomes to strain records, and curation of best-available assemblies for downstream use

 - Own and operate the strain dereplication pipeline, advancing isolated colonies from primary 16S/ITS screening through unique-strain identification and entry into the biobank

 - Design and curate screening plates for downstream functional assays, including layout, strain selection, and verification of taxonomy and safety annotations

Build and own Kingdom’s AI-compatible scientific data infrastructure:

 - Build AI-compatible data infrastructure for Kingdom that captures, stores, and analyzes data across a variety of modalities

 - Develop and apply statistical and computational methods to power biological insights and support wet-lab workflows, including experimental design, metric development and validation, and method onboarding, powered with new AI/agentic tools

 - Maintain the integrity of the strain database backend: tube tracking, naming conventions, and audits of our physical inventory and pipeline data to identify anomalies

 - Model complex, interrelated scientific entities (samples, experiments, runs, results, physical inventory) into a coherent sch

source_jobs.title: Senior Manager, Commercial Strategy
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

At Kingdom, we’ve pioneered Superculture® ingredients: an entirely new class of clinically-validated postbiotics that target the root causes of unmet pet health needs. We’re actively selling Superculture® Pet Oral and Superculture® Pet Immune to pet food and supplement brands, and will be launching our first Superculture® ingredient for humans later this year.

We're looking for a Sr Manager, Commercial Strategy to join our small but mighty team, and own scoping the pipeline that determines which markets and which ingredients Kingdom should pursue next. In this role, you'll translate commercial and technical opportunities into validated, customer-tested ingredient concepts ready for development, clinical validation, and go-to-market. The work spans three things: defining the path for our existing ingredients into human markets, scoping and prioritizing our future ingredient development roadmap across pet and human, and setting clinical study targets that align our trial pipeline with the biggest commercial opportunities. This is a commercial role, with success measured by the speed and quality of the ingredient bets we make — and the revenue they unlock.

This is a full-time, in-person role at our headquarters in Brooklyn, NY, with occasional travel to customers and industry conferences.

We founded Kingdom in 2019 to cultivate healthier living with natural microbes, and have raised $40M in venture funding from top investors. Less than a year in market, our ingredients are already powering dozens of products from leading pet brands, with overwhelmingly positive customer reception. 1 out of 3 product launches using our ingredients have earned a #1 New Release on Amazon, and 90% of our customers from last year are launching additional products with us this year. Our core technical edge is our scientific platform, which spans ingredient discovery, clinical trials, and manufacturing scale-up.

 
 

RESPONSIBILITIES

In this role, you’ll report to the VP of Commercialization, and will work closely with the co-founders, commercial team, key scientists, customers, and industry advisors/experts to:

Define the path for existing ingredient technologies in human markets (short to medium term focus):

 - Scope and prioritize human market opportunities for our existing ingredient technologies (based on end-product and claims landscape, unmet consumer needs, competitive ingredient set, and more)

 - Define market structure, pricing segments, key players, and end-consumer willingness-to-pay

 - Own customer discovery for prospective opportunities: build foundational relationships, gather commercialization and claims-relevant insight, attend conferences, and grow Kingdom's presence in target markets

 - Define the final ingredient concept, moment of truth, end-product applications, and commercialization path (positioning, claims, unit economics, regulatory implications) for us to bring the ingredient to market

Identify and prioritize new ingredient development opportunities (medium to longer term focus):

 - Review and refine the commercial criteria and evaluation process for assessing future ingredient opportunities

 - Scope future ingredient opportunities across pet and human markets (food, supplement, cosmetics, and more)

 - Own customer discovery across prospective opportunities - introducing Kingdom as a potential partner, building relationships, and surfacing commercialization insights

 - Develop opportunities from concept to clear ingredient commercial specifications, including moment of truth, customer/expert validation, end-product prioritization, unit economics, and key ingredient requirements/specifications for technical handoff

 - Iterate with technical team and external experts to refine and finalize ingredient concepts

Collaborate with technical team to set clinical study targets for new markets and new ingredients (ongoing):

 - Test, refine, and maintain target claims for ingredient pipeline

 - Provide the cl

notes: AI-native functional ingredients company with strong scientific focus
